Software Engineer.name: Software Engineer @ Arbisoft
Software Engineer.description: Worked on AI notetaking app for video conferencing platforms and integration of LiteLLM AI gateway with different agent harnesses for AI assisted development within company.
points: Developed multiple core modules including credits and billing module, Stripe integration, meeting settings, sharing and editing module, and user feedback collection module.
Built App-wide Search using PostgreSQL Full-Text Search with GIN indexing to optimize query performance.
Assisted in real-time Google Calendar ↔ PostgreSQL event syncing module.
Implemented alerting mechanism for failures using slack alerts and platform monitoring using better stack.
Engineered a containerized Selenium bot solution for Google Meet and Zoom to automate meeting participation, capture audio/video, and identify active speakers.
Authored subroutines using AWS SDK to streamline container lifecycle management on ECS Fargate instances.
Worked on desktop app built with ElectronJS and implemented real-time notifications using Firebase Cloud messaging.
Handled compatibility issues between agent harnesses such as ClaudeCode, OpenCode and LiteLLM AI gateway.

Software Engineering Intern.name: Full Stack Intern @ ThinkSoft
Software Engineering Intern.description: Worked on a cutting-edge web development tool called WebbsAI that combines drag-and-drop functionality with Generative AI assistance to simplify website creation process.
points: Implemented secure and efficient API endpoints using the 'next-connect' package.
Added a comprehensive SEO and OpenGraph settings feature with SERP preview for websites created using WebbsAI.
Introduced a feature for wrapping selected text with typography components in web editor.
Leveraged TypeScript to ensure type safety and produce robust code, enhancing reliability and maintainability.
Developed WebbsAI product website using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript.

Computer Science Undergrad.name: Bachelor in Computer Science @ National University of Science & Technology (NUST)
Computer Science Undergrad.description:
Studied computer science from School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science (SEECS) at NUST.
Graduated with CGPA of 3.82/4.00. Received GPA-Based Academic Scholarship in 7 out of 8 semsters.
Worked as an Executive in IEEE SEECS in Publication chapter for duration of 1 year.
Final Year Project was “Explainable Diabetic Retinopathy Severity Grading using Deep Learning”
